data.description_suggestion: Deletes an existing document of the specified DocType identified by its document name. The document is permanently removed from the database. Returns a 202 Accepted response indicating the deletion request was processed. Triggers DocType delete hooks and any configured cleanup workflows. Requires appropriate permissions for the DocType. Deletion may fail if the document is referenced by other documents (foreign key constraints) or if delete permissions are insufficient. This operation cannot be undone.
